a_visualization_practice_to_help_you_obs: A visualization practice to help you observe thoughts without getting caught in them.
imagine_you_are_sitting_by_a_gentle_stre: Imagine you are sitting by a gentle stream. Whenever a thought appears, notice it, place it on a leaf, and watch it float away. You are the observer, not the thought.
each_time_you_let_a_leaf_float_by_you_st: Each time you let a leaf float by, you strengthen your ability to stay present and detached from intrusive thoughts.
